response: The movie that was the directorial debut of Jonathan Glazer and included the musical piece *Lujon* is *Sexy Beast*. The movie *Lujon* is also featured in the soundtracks of *The Big Lebowski*, *Sexy Beast*, *W.E.*, and *Two Lovers*. Another movie that includes the piece *Lujon* and has the letter "B" in its name is *Surfer*, which was part of the advertising campaign directed by Jonathan Glazer.
